dtsPropsFor.TournamentStatusBadge:
/** Tournament lifecycle status; maps to a localized Russian label + tone. */
  status: "draft" | "registration_open" | "registration_closed" | "in_progress" | "completed" | "cancelled";
dtsPropsFor.MatchStatusBadge:
/** Match lifecycle status; maps to a localized Russian label + tone. */
  status: "scheduled" | "in_progress" | "pending_confirmation" | "completed" | "cancelled";
dtsPropsFor.ParticipantStatusBadge:
/** Participant status. "pending" | "confirmed" | "cancelled" render as tone pills; any other string renders as plain grey text. */
  status: string;
dtsPropsFor.Chevron:
/** true = points right (collapsed); false = rotated 90° (expanded). */
  collapsed: boolean;
